apps.name: petshop
apps.stack: .NET Framework 2.0/4.x / ASP.NET WebForms (21 projects)
apps.notes: S5 BLOCKED: ACA app returns HTTP 500 -- SQL 18456 login failed. Andon cord pulled. Issue #732. Root cause: ServiceLinker creates SQL contained user for wrong principal (app-petshop-dev OID 0c8f647b) instead of user-assigned MI id-petshop-dev (OID ee7e3776). Manual workaround applied (contained user created via SQL admin) but not CI-driven. Required fix: replace ServiceLinker SQL grant with explicit sqlcmd step in infra workflow. Marked FACTORY_COMPLETE incorrectly based on /healthz/ready HTTP 200 only.

inventory.treatmentRationale: Replatform to Azure Container Apps. Modern .NET 8 rebuild completed but blocked on SQL auth.
inventory.architecture: .NET Framework 4.5 layered architecture, SQL Server, ASP.NET MVC
